title: Repaired Untitled cross-post bug — 3 Telegraph posts re-published with correct titles
summary: Fixed extract_title_and_body() to read frontmatter title: field (was only checking angle:). 3 prior cross-posts had Untitled titles because they use Hugo-style title: frontmatter without an H1 in body. Removed stale entries from posted_urls.json, re-posted all 3 with correct descriptive titles.

code_changes.change: Added metadata.get("title") as first fallback before angle and Untitled

notes: This is a concrete quality repair (bugfix + repost), not a prompt/rerun tweak. Existing hold-window repairs are prompt/contract changes; this is a runtime code fix with verifiable output.
